 I'm much better now, thanks. I had a bad cold and a fever yesterday.
 I'm sorry to hear that. Did you go to see a doctor?
 Yes, my mom took me to the clinic. The doctor said I need to rest for two days and drink more water.
 Did the doctor give you any medicine?
 Yes, I have to take the medicine three times a day after meals. And I can't eat ice cream or fried food.
 That's right. You should eat more fruits and vegetables to get better quickly.
 I will. I missed the math test yesterday. Can you tell me when I can take it?
 The teacher said you can take it next Monday after school.
 Thank you so much for telling me.

 That's a cool hobby! What kind of stamps do you collect?
 I collect stamps with animal patterns. I have stamps from China, Japan and Australia.

 About 200. I keep them in a special album. I add new stamps to it every month.

 Yes, I have a pen pal in Canada. We send each other stamps from our countries.
 That's amazing! I like collecting postcards. I have postcards from different cities.
 Maybe we can exchange some stamps and postcards sometime.
 I'd love to!

Would you like your steak ______ or well-done, sir?
 Medium, please. I don't like it too rare or too cooked.
